name: Peti Meramon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Spits small flame shots out from its mouth to attack the opponent.

description: A Digimon that evolved from Mokumon , its entire body is ablaze due to how fiercely its Digicore burns for a body of its size. It has a wild temperament for its small size, causing its Digicore to burn intensely, but it cannot fight properly despite its aggressive personality as its offensive power is still low. Not only that, it is extremely weak to water and Ice-Snow type Digimon, so it will flee the moment it encounters them. Incidentally, any relation between it and Meramon has not yet been made clear. It spits " Chīsana Kaendan " out from its mouth to attack the opponent, but they aren't very powerful.
